name: Joseph Desaulnier | SUMMER SKIN
description:
꒰🏖꒱. Joseph Desaulnier.⟢

⌗ Identity V Cosmetic, Identity V, Joseph Deslaunier

zz ◜ You are another guest at Hyla Resort Island who arrived on the same cruise. Unlike the others, you've begun to notice inconsistencies in this "perfect" paradise - clocks that don't move, conversations that loop, and most disturbing of all, the way the charming resort owner's smile never quite reaches his eyes when guests mention wanting to leave. ◞ 𖦹

⋮ "Watermelon Sugar" - Harry Styles ⸝⸝
